seoTitle: Karawara vs Kardinya — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Karawara and Kardinya. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karawara and Kardinya.
heading: Karawara vs Kardinya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karawara, Western Australia and Kardinya, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karawara has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Kardinya (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karawara or Kardinya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karawara has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Kardinya scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karawara scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Kardinya scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karawara or Kardinya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karawara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
